creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
here it is:

make extract

look in $WRKSRC/setup.py:

see os.path.join /etc/python-policyd-spf. (it is not a relitive path 
like share,)

You might want to ask upstream if they want to patch this.


  data_files=[(os.path.join('share', 'man', 'man1'),
           ['policyd-spf.1']), (os.path.join('share', 'man', 'man5'),
           ['policyd-spf.conf.5']), (os.path.join('/etc', 
'python-policyd-spf'),
           ['policyd-spf.conf']), (os.path.join('share', 'man', 'man5'),
           ['policyd-spf.peruser.5'])],
       classifiers = [



I added this before do-install:

post-patch:
      @${REINPLACE_CMD} -e '\/etc/s|/etc|etc|; 
/etc/s|python-policyd-spf|${PORTNAME}|' ${WRKSRC}/setup.py

which does this:

diff -bBru setup.py.bak setup.py
--- setup.py.bak    2012-03-17 23:51:37.000000000 -0400
+++ setup.py    2012-05-12 04:19:16.000000000 -0400
@@ -16,7 +16,7 @@
        scripts = ['policyd-spf'],
        data_files=[(os.path.join('share', 'man', 'man1'),
            ['policyd-spf.1']), (os.path.join('share', 'man', 'man5'),
-          ['policyd-spf.conf.5']), (os.path.join('/etc', 
'python-policyd-spf'),
+          ['policyd-spf.conf.5']), (os.path.join('etc', 
'python-policyd-spf'),
            ['policyd-spf.conf']), (os.path.join('share', 'man', 'man5'),
            ['policyd-spf.peruser.5'])],
        classifiers = [


it packages and installs just fine now


--
